commands.payload:
Unknown command: -h
Usage: lugha <command>

Commands:
  import    Import translations from external sources

result.stderr:
Unknown argument: -?
Usage: lugha import --format <po|resx> --source <file> --namespace <ns> --output <dir> [--contracts] [--language <tag>]

Options:
  --format       Translation file format (po, resx)
  --source       Path to the translation source file
  --namespace    Target C# namespace for generated code
  --output       Output directory for generated files
  --contracts    Emit ITextScope interfaces (contracts) from a reference locale
  --language     BCP 47 language tag (required for resx when not emitting contracts)
